relationships: kab:Tom ur yettili ara kul ass deg uxxam deg wass n letnayen
kab:Ilaq ad tedduḍ yid-i kra n wass
kab:Yella wass i deg turareḍ aflipper ﹖
kab:Tom yella akked Mary kra yekka wass
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ icahen akked Tom﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ akked Tom urar n mmet-a-ccix﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ ccix-mmet akked Tom﹖
kab:Ad ak-waliɣ deg wass n warim i d-iteddun di Ustriya
